name: Fran's Special Pate
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons white wine (or water or chicken broth)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 275 degrees F. (135 degrees C.)
2. Cook bacon until crisp. Reserve bacon drippings.
3. Place 2 tablespoons bacon drippings in a frying pan. Saute chicken livers until pink inside. Season the chicken cutlet with 1 tablespoon salt, then saute in butter for 3 minutes on each side. Add wine (water or broth) and simmer for 5 minutes longer. Reserve sauce.
4. Process bacon, chicken livers, water chestnuts, and eggs in a food processor until fine. Add remaining seasoned salt, Boursin cheese, basil, chicken sauce, and pepper. Mix well.
5. Pack the combined mixture into a large buttered loaf pan. Place a heavy weight on top of the loaf pan to keep the pate from rising.
6. Bake pate for 2 hours. Open oven door and bake for 1 hour longer. Remove from oven, allow to come to room temperature. Refrigerate. Cut evenly into slices to serve.
